author: anon-581fd578
content:
Plan: Two gaps in the desktop render pipeline need closing.

1. Text shaping: flatten_node_to_render() in event_loop.rs sets content: NodeContent::None for every node. Need to detect Text nodes (NodeKind::Text) and use CosmicTextEngine to shape text into PositionedGlyph vectors, setting NodeContent::Text(glyphs, color).

2. GPU presentation: submit_frame() calls renderer.render_frame(commands) but ignores the output and never presents to the wgpu surface. Need to: (a) store the wgpu surface/device/queue in the Renderer or DesktopRuntime, (b) create a surface texture each frame, (c) rasterize render commands to the texture, (d) call present().

Approach: Read Renderer, CosmicTextEngine, and wgpu setup to understand current state, then wire them together.
